data.title: Add test_quality_overlay flag to review complexity classifier
data.description:
## Description
Extend the review complexity classifier to detect test file changes and set test_quality_overlay flag.

### Steps
1. In plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh, add _compute_test_quality_overlay function
2. Pattern: if any changed file matches tests/**/*.py or tests/**/*.sh or tests/**/*.ts → set test_quality_overlay=true
3. Add test_quality_overlay field to classifier JSON output (alongside security_overlay, performance_overlay)
4. Update classifier-tier-output.md contract to document new field

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh — Edit
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/classifier-tier-output.md — Edit

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Classifier output includes test_quality_overlay field
  Verify: echo "diff --git a/tests/foo.py b/tests/foo.py" | .claude/scripts/dso review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('test_quality_overlay', 'MISSING'))"
